header.title: Admin Profile
header.description: Manage your account settings, security preferences, and view your system access.

securitySettings.title: Password Settings
securitySettings.description: Update your password and security preferences.
securitySettings.newPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
securitySettings.passwordFailed: Failed to update password. Please try again.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
twoFactor.descriptionDisabled: Your account is currently not protected with Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) via Google Authenticator
twoFactor.descriptionEnabled: Your account is protected with Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) via Google Authenticator

unbind.title: Unbind Two-Factor Authentication

warning.title: Security Warning
warning.line1: Disabling 2FA will reduce your account security
warning.line2: You will be required to set up 2FA again on next login
warning.line3: This action will be logged for security audit

unbind.codeHelper: Enter the 6-digit code from Google Authenticator to confirm

setup2fa.title: Set Up Two-Factor Authentication
setup2fa.description: Secure your admin account with Google Authenticator. This is required to access the CryptoPay Admin dashboard.

requirement.title: Security Requirement
requirement.description: Two-factor authentication is mandatory for all admin accounts. You must complete this setup to continue.

step1.title: Download Google Authenticator
step1.description: Install Google Authenticator on your mobile device from the App Store or Google Play Store.

step2.title: Scan QR Code
step2.description: Open Google Authenticator and scan this QR code to add your CryptoPay Admin account.

step3.title: Or Enter Setup Key Manually
step3.description: If you can't scan the QR code, enter this key manually in Google Authenticator:

step4.title: Enter Verification Code
step4.description: Enter the 6-digit code from Google Authenticator to verify your setup.
step4.label: 6-Digit Verification Code

setup2fa.consent: By enabling 2FA, you agree to use Google Authenticator for all future logins.
setup2fa.help: Need help? Contact your system administrator for assistance.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.description: View your system access permissions and roles
